---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for GatKeeper
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the use case it enables.

## 💭 Proposed Solution

If you have ideas on how to implement this, describe them here.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this hasn't been requested
- [ ] This feature aligns with GatKeeper's vision (predictive, not reactive)
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this feature (optional)
